data.title: 《Blue Archive》4周年纪念 OST 现已上线数字流媒体！
data.summary: [Blue Archive 4th Anniversary OST Now Available on Digital Streaming!] Sensei, the Blue Archive 4th
data.body:
[Blue Archive 4th Anniversary OST Now Available on Digital Streaming!]

Sensei, the Blue Archive 4th Anniversary OST is now available on digital streaming platforms! 🎵
Relive the memories through melodies filled with all the moments we've shared together.

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3351979

#BlueArchive
